# Comparison of General Linear Models {model-comparison-2}

```{r model-comparison-2-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/model-comparison-2-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/model-comparison-2/"
)
```

```{r child-model-comparison-2, child="../lecture-content/26-model-comparison-2.Rmd"}
```
